name: The"best Ever" Pizza Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 1 medium onion and mince 1 clove garlic.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a pan and sauté the onion and garlic until they are soft.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the pan and stir occasionally as you simmer slowly for about 1 hour.
4. This sauce will make enough for 2 large pizzas.
